pkgmetadata.longdescription:
ESOS (Energy Service OS) — RT-Thread coprocessor firmware for SpaceMIT K1 (N308) or K3 (RT24) chips, selected via USE=k1 or USE=k3. The upstream openeuler-riscv tree carries both platforms; ./build.sh config picks which to build. Built with upstream baremetal riscv64-elf-gcc — no vendor toolchain.
K3 RDEPENDs on sys-firmware/esos-lite (PM mini-blob .incbin'd at SRAM 0). K1 installs /lib/firmware/esos.elf for AP's remoteproc. K3 installs /boot/esos.itb for u-boot to load into RT24 cores.

use.flag: Build for K3 RT24 coprocessors (rv64imafdc/lp64d/medany), produces esos.itb FIT image
